storyInfo: The Vine-Bead Court interrogates Enciodes on recent diplomatic issues. The Victorians force their way into the mine to inspect it, and discover a large amount of scrap metal left over from failed attempts to recreate heavy weaponry.

attributes.content: You know, it's real hard getting an audience with you these days.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: ...Enciodes.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I am truly sorry I was unable to attend the Matriarch's funeral.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Madam Sciurus, I am deeply saddened by what has befallen the Browntail clan. Please let me know if there is anything Clan Silverash can do to help.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Thanks, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: But that's not what I came here to discuss.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Your visit this time, Madam Sciurus, must be to give me a chance to earn your trust.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Hmph... My sister once told me that you're least trustworthy when you lower your head like this.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I wonder about your opinion of me, then.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You don't have to beat around the bush. I don't like it.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: My sister used to scold me for being impulsive, and for not always thinking things through before I speak or act.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I wanted to prove to her that I didn't need to hide under her wing, that I could do something for Clan Browntail.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: But now, as new matriarch of the clan, there is no one left for me to prove anything to.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I understand how you feel. I... also have two younger sisters.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And you think they're both smarter than me, huh? Both Ensia, and the Saintess...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: You think too little of yourself, Madam Sciurus.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: However, I do think they share your persistence and determination.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Is Ensia okay? I heard... she was in an accident.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Thank you for your concern. She is safe and sound, and has already returned home.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You always keep that calm and composed demeanor.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: What I want to know is... these attacks on Kjerag, including what happened to my sister... Did you know about them ahead of time?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: So this is the real reason you decided to visit me today.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Enciodes, my sister had been helping you this entire time, isn't that right?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I wasn't totally in the dark about it, but it wasn't until her passing that I learned...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Your plans—for Victoria, Rhine Lab, and what Monch has been investigating... There's too much I don't know anything about.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Don't try to deny it. Don't lie to me, Enciodes. You have to know the truth behind her murder.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: If you truly believe I had a hand in the Matriarch's death—
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: No... That's not what I mean.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I don't know what Ratatos was plotting with you, but I know for sure... that whatever it was, it was to protect Kjerag.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: So... I will follow in her footsteps... Whatever Clan Browntail's affairs may be, I will take responsibility for them.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Which is why... I need you to tell me exactly what happened to her—
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: My apologies, Sir Enciodes, but they were determined to break in no matter what—
attributes.name: Silverash Clan Guard

attributes.content: To what do I owe the honor, for you all to barge into my home like this?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Sir Enciodes, why did Karlan Trade transfer all its shares in the Kjerag-Kazimierz joint mining operation to Victoria without authorization?
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Where did this news come from?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It is an observable fact—the mines have completely been taken over by the Victorians.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Great Elder Adso believes that such actions by Karlan Trade constitute illegal collusion with a foreign power, and as such, the Vine-Bead Court has no choice but to exercise its authority to intervene.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: We require that you report to the Vine-Bead Court immediately to explain yourself.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: If I understand this correctly, the Vine-Bead Court means to formally interrogate Clan Silverash?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The people of Kjerag are uneasy enough as it is. The last thing we want is to see this conflict escalate further.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: However, Sir Enciodes, as the head of the clan, if you still believe you bear responsibility for Kjerag, please go to the Vine-Bead Court with us to discuss the next steps.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Very well. I have no reason to refuse.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: However, if I am to explain the situation, I will need some time to prepare the relevant documents. Please allow me that.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Furthermore, I still have some things to discuss with Madam Sciurus, so I would like to ask for your patience.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Of course, Sir Enciodes.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Madam Sciurus, thank you for taking the time to look after Ensia. I would like to formally invite you to be a guest of Clan Silverash.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I would also like to thank you for your concern in person, while Ensia is present as well.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Wha...?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: It would have been more courteous to have sent the invitation to you in a formal capacity.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But given the hasty nature of this matter, the best I can do is to throw something together by hand. I do hope you'll forgive me.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: We look forward to you gracing us with your presence.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Before his 'invitee' can respond, Enciodes picks up a pen and paper from the table, scribbles down a few lines, then hands the 'invitation' over.
Sciurus takes it. There is only an address on the piece of paper, hardly an invitation at all.
Thank you for the invitation.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I'll be there on time.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.text: To Mr. Edelweiss of Karlan Trade:
\n\nI hope this letter finds you well.
\n\nAt the time you are read this, I am yet to receive sitrep authorization from Rhine Lab, so please take note—
\n\nThis letter does not, in any capacity, serve as an agreement or treaty between Rhine Lab and Karlan Trade. Rather, it only represents my personal analysis of the recent phenomena in Kjerag.
\n\nMy specimen comes from the sound waves collected by the observation station at 3:19 AM on December 7, 1101.
I can say for certain that at that time, an unidentified object fell from the sky onto Mount Karlan.
\n\nThough the chain of evidence definitively linking the phenomena is still missing, a Catastrophe did in fact occur 32 hours later.
\n\nI do not intend to establish a causal link between these two things. If this crash is a singular event in history, then so too is the Catastrophe.
What I AM preparing to do is to confirm whether or not there is an empirical connection between these two events.
\n\nAdditionally, do forgive my frankness, but if the hypothesis that these two events are linked does bear out, the outcome for Kjerag is not optimistic—
\n\nWhatever factor that has protected Kjerag from Catastrophes over the millennia may no longer be effective, or at least, be in an unusable state.
I would, of course, love to write this off as mere conjecture. But nevertheless, I also hope that Karlan Trade will be adequately mindful of the potential risks moving forward.
\n\nCarolin, an insider with more detailed information, has likely made similar inferences, but I am in the dark as to what her objectives are at this moment.
\n\nI will strive to complete this research while maintaining an objective and rational perspective, and would greatly appreciate Karlan Trade's support in my efforts.

attributes.content: Come in.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I was just looking for you, Director.
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Employee

attributes.content: Take this letter over to Enciodes. Classify it top secret.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Yes, sir. Right away.
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Employee

attributes.content: Any other news?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Yes—the observation post previously dispatched to the mining site has sent back a sighting report.
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Employee

attributes.content: A convoy bearing Victorian markings is approaching the outskirts of the mine, but the specific origins are unknown.
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Employee

attributes.content: Matterhorn led his clansmen there ahead of time. He said that he would try to stall for as much time as possible and await your judgment.
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Employee

attributes.content: The Victorians would've come sooner or later. Looks like we won't have to wait any longer.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Prepare vehicles as soon as possible. Matterhorn may not be able to hold them off for long.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Tell him to let the other party make the first move, and prioritize observation. I will arrive shortly.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: ...I'm warning you, don't get in our way, if you know what's good for you.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: I am simply following orders. The area ahead is a restricted warehouse, and nobody is allowed to enter without Karlan Trade's permission.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Has no one informed you that House Caster has acquired all of Kazimierz's rights to this site?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: To the best of my knowledge, the handover process is still underway. We were only notified by Kazimierz yesterday.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Which is why we have to inspect all the assets in advance. If you have an complaints, you can take them up with Her Grace the Duke.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Now, listen to your betters and open the warehouse door post-haste.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Finally, someone worth talking to.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Mr. Gnosis Edelweiss of Karlan Trade.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: It seems the introduction I've prepared will be going to waste, good sir.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Of course. Naturally, you also understand who I'm representing here.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Due to your mismanagement and the resultant substantial financial losses, Her Grace the Duke has decided to dismiss some key employees of Karlan Trade employed at this site, including the former executive manager.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: To this, I have no objection. I will cooperate fully during this handover process.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Excellent. Now then, Mr. Edelweiss, please open the warehouse door.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: ...However, on this point alone, I cannot comply.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: What Matterhorn said is true. There indeed are regulations pertaining to this confidential warehouse. I humbly ask for yours and Her Grace's understanding.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Based on the information I have, the security clearance level on this warehouse was raised just recently.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: What do you say to this, Mr. Edelweiss?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Allow me to explain.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: This warehouse is mainly used to store various kinds of industrial waste, but recently, the purification system and negative pressure ventilation system both malfunctioned.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: We temporarily raised the security clearance level and strictly restricted access in the interim before professionals can handle the situation.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I fully understand Her Grace's concern about the assets acquired, but for your safety, could I ask that this inspection be postponed?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I accept the risks at hand. Just open the door.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: All else aside, this is Kjerag's mine.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Should pollutants leak, or any other dangerous situation arises, Kjerag does not rule out the right to intervene through administrative measures.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Before you offer to take responsibility, I suggest you contact Her Grace the Duke once more.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: You're...
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Good to see you again, Mr. Matterhorn.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Pardon me, Father. I'm afraid I'll have to ask you to wait at reception for now. I currently have business with our diplomatic guest.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Mr. Edelweiss, I was expressly invited here by the Victorians.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Since when is the Vine-Bead Court so concerned with temporal affairs?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Today, both the clan leadership and the general public are dissatisfied with the way Karlan Trade has been engaging with Victoria.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: The Great Elder has summoned Sir Enciodes to an inquiry into the matter; perhaps, you will also need to report to the Vine-Bead Court soon.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Why, then, would a cleric feel a need to accept an invitation to come here before that?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: I wish to ensure a smooth handover process, and hope that Karlan Trade is willing to cooperate to the fullest extent.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Please open the warehouse door, Mr. Edelweiss.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: Given that power has been restored by the three clans, perhaps the Vine-Bead Court would be more representative of Kjerag's 'administrative measures'?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Matterhorn, open the door.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: The door slowly opens, and the Victorian ambassador is caught unaware by the dust that diffuses from within. He squints and fans the air in front of him with his hand.
There is neither the smell of industrial waste nor the texture of Originium dust. The ambassador's eyes gradually adjust to the vast, unobstructed warehouse, within which is—
...Nothing but scrap metal?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: As I stated, there is nothing here but industrial waste.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Please leave as soon as you've finished your inspection. Staying here for an extended period of time would be detrimental to your health.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Everyone, stay put. I'm conducting the inspection myself.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: As soon as he enters the warehouse, he feels the vast space around him dilating in all directions, the steel frames stretching straight to the ceiling surrounded by scrap metal of all shapes and sizes.
There's no way such a large warehouse was set up just to store these things. It's far too pretentious.
He approaches the bottom of one of the shelves and reaches out to rummage through it with no particular aim in mind. The clanging of metal echoes through the warehouse.
(Hushed voice) Wait, this is...
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: (Hushed voice) It's still half-intact, and I can still make out the insignia of Silverash's private army, the 'Tschäggättä'. Were these originally weapons and gear not improperly disposed of after being thrown in the shredder...?
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: An idea bubbles up, and he keeps looking elsewhere. Though Karlan Trade has been quite meticulous, a few clues are bound to leak through. Of this, he is certain.
(Hushed voice) Replicas of Victoria's newest equipment, as well as large-caliber naval gun parts...
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: (Hushed voice) All failures, unable to break through the technical barrier...
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: The army designations. The insignias. Many other terms in the Kjeragi language. He quietly memorizes them all.
Sir! Are you done yet?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: ...Yes, I am.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: The ambassador returns to the group.
I've more or less seen what I needed to see, Mr. Edelweiss.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: I will summarize the entire situation and faithfully report it to the Duke.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Sir, the internal railway in the mining site has just been cleared, and you haven't had time to inspect it yet.
attributes.name: Victorian Guard

attributes.content: Does Victoria also need to use that internal railway?
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Yes, we've contacted a number of suppliers for quotes. Using the internal railway can significantly reduce transportation costs.
attributes.name: Victorian Ambassador

attributes.content: Father, is the Vine-Bead Court aware of this? If you are so keen to get involved in diplomatic affairs, Karlan Trade hopes that you will also be willing to verify any business entities that wish to join.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: Gnosis's concern interrupts the thoughts of the Vine-Bead Court envoy, who then looks away from the railway.
...That would require the Great Elder's input.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy

attributes.content: I understand.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr, I ask that the Vine-Bead Court not make things difficult for Enciodes. I will remain at Karlan Trade's headquarters, awaiting your summons.
attributes.name: Gnosis

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Envoy
